mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , TITLE , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , RUNNING_TIME , STATE , LANGUAGE , INTRODUCE FROM MOVIE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPRING_BOOT.MOVIE (MOVIE_ID, TITLE, OPEN_DATE, RUNNING_TIME, STATE, LANGUAGE, INTRODUCE) VALUES ('MV-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_BOARD_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0'), #{title}, SYSDATE, #{runningTime}, #{state}, #{language}, #{introduce})
